title: Curriculum Developer Vacancy at Manipal University Consulting Pvt Ltd - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Curriculum Developer Vacancy at Manipal University Consulting Pvt Ltd - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Manipal University Consulting Pvt Ltd, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Curriculum Developer for our Howrah operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Manipal University Consulting Pvt Ltd:
Manipal University Consulting Pvt Ltd is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Participate in school events, workshops, and training programs
• Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback
• Support students with special educational needs
• Collaborate with faculty on curriculum development initiatives
• Contribute to school newsletter, blogs, and other publications
• Maintain student records and prepare progress reports
• Participate in teacher training and professional development programs

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Content Creation
• Proficiency in Student Assessment
• Proficiency in CBSE/ICSE Standards
• Proficiency in LMS Platforms
• Proficiency in Child Psychology
• Proficiency in Special Education
• Proficiency in IB Curriculum
• Proficiency in Mentoring

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Life and accident insurance
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Referral bonus program
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Howrah, West Bengal, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Manipal University Consulting Pvt Ltd!
